feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Create a reservation in S/4hana Cloud (stock reservat...
entry.content: You can manually create a Reservation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud now.

entry.title: Unplanned depreciation useful life not correct
entry.content:
Hey all! 

I have a question. I have a query regarding unplanned depreciation and how it affects the useful life on the coming years of depreciation. 

Let's just take an example so it is easier for you to understand my issue.

01.01.2024: An asset is acquisitioned for the value of 1 000 000 EUR. The useful life of this particular asset is 30 years and based on that the depreciation is calculated. The asset is set to be depreciated for 33 333 per year during 30 years, and it will end 2054.

01.01.2024: We decide to do an unplanned depreciation of 200 000 EUR reducing its value. My question here is why in "comparison" tab the depreciation for the upcoming years is not changed? It will still depreciate 33 333 EUR, which will result that end of life will be earlier than 2054. 2048 will the end of life be for this asset.

Please support me on this. Is there any configuration that is wrong and why is it not adjusting the upcoming years for depreciation? I use depreciation key LINK (straight line from acquisition value).

entry.title: Re: About the help portal variance of Extension Ledger, S...
entry.content:
Hi @satoko_nakayama,

Please note that SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition are totally different products.

The Cloud Mindset is one of the most important guiding principles while implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, therefore, there are some considerations that you need to analyze. For instance, you cannot add ledgers after the initial scoping is finalized, and you cannot remove activated ledgers.

Please review in detail the following documentation that also includes guidance about asset accounting:

  • Ledger Scenarios: Choosing the Right Combination for Your Business Needs
  • Assign Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company Codes

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports bug suppressing a box (suppress formula)
entry.content:
Hi Patrick, I have the report. odd thing is when I first opened the report it popped up a message indicate not supported. I then click on Design and then preview and the report worked.

I then closed the report and CR asked if I wanted to save the changes???? Opened it again and now it works... very odd.

CR seemed to have fixed the report.

I'll send it off to R&D and see if they can find anything...

Thanks again

Don

entry.title: update number point indicator with input field filter
entry.content:
Hello ,

I have created an input field filter for a table and the code is as follows:

var Input= this.getValue();
var i=0;
var res=Table_1.getDataSource().getMembers("ZPEDIDO");
var filter_data = [""];


if (Input === "") {
Table_1.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("ZPEDIDO");
} else {
for (i = 0; i < res.length; i++) {
if (res[i].description.startsWith(Input)) {
filter_data.push(res[i].description);
}
}
Table_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("ZPEDIDO", [Input]);
}

but I have a problem, that this is only filtering the values of the table but not the numerical point indicators like the following image,

I would like to know if it is possible to filter the numerical point indicators according to an input field filter? How could I adapt it to my current code? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Mapping of bank statement transaction codes is not wo...
entry.content:
Hello Kostadin,

The problem seems not the application of a custom external-transaction-code and mapping to a designated payment method per se - but the conformity of the content of payment explanation blog :86: in format MT940 DE.

Here fields are delineated by characters ?00 ?20 ?30 etc..

The first field is reserved for a 3-digit External Transactions Code, others for memo-text, Payer IBAN, Business Partner Names etc..

If this is not followed and instead of ?00 any other or special character is provided - the External Transaction Code will not be interpreted and the Payment Method Mapping will not take effect.

In the absence of a mapped payment method the only information available is the Payment Direction and Amount, hence Other Incoming/Outgoing Payment.

Hope this helps, 

Frank

entry.title: Re: ODBC 18 Driver - Invalid Argument for Database
entry.content:
Hello,

I have it now, thank you for the logs and report.

The report works for me.

I'm not sure why, older SP's would catch the error when a reserved character was used in a formula name, in your case it's the Parameter that has the character in it, but still applies.

See this KBA:

2042551 - The following characters are reserved for internal use only in Crystal Reports Designer formula names - ‘@’,’?’,’{‘,’}’

It could be because of the history of the report:

Try renaming the Parameter without the @ in it's name and see if that works for you.

Since the .NET SDK log does catch the error, CRD is more forgiving since it's a Design tool so it can deal with errors on the fly and work around them, SDK can't, it assumes the report is 100% valid:

2024-3-28-13-15-23 10164 ..\cserrinf.cpp 523 Error 31853 (..\..\src\data\datainterface.cpp, 7889): Invalid Argument provided.: 1

2024-3-28-13-15-23 10164 ..\cserrinf.cpp 523 Error 31853 (..\..\src\data\datainterface.cpp, 7889): Invalid Argument provided.: 1

But, I'll send the zip file over to R&D and see what they say.

Don

entry.title: Re: KSB1 Ready to Use Template in SAP Business Process Au...

entry.title: Interview questions & interview preparation tips for SAP plant maintenance module.
entry.content:
Interview questions & interview preparation tips for SAP plant maintenance module. Can someone tell me where can I find the interview questions & how to prepare for SAP plant maintenace functional consultant interview.

I am involved as a core team member in implementation of SAP S/4 hana plant maintenance module. I have knowledge of SAP PM configuration. Need to attend a mock interview. Please give me tips & tricks for going into SAP world.

entry.title: Inbound API calls in Message Dashboard
entry.content:
Hi Forum,

How can we monitor the incoming API calls in S4 HANA Public Cloud? I am looking for a tile where I can monitor all inbound and outbound API calls, and even reprocess them after correcting the error. Similar to transaction BD87 in ECC.

Example - We are updating Outbound Delivery Document using standard API from CPI and business wants to monitor and re-process the errored out API calls.

Thanks,

Anadi Parasher

entry.title: IRPA_CORE.TIMEOUT: Waiting for element_uI5Element_1
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I have been trying to automate a Fiori App using the recorder in SAP BTP.  The subjected error is happening for few apps, the one I have attached screenshot is Manage Product Master Data. I have cross checked the captures, it has perfectly captured the screen and the UI5_element as well, but still it ends with error that waiting for ui5_element. I have tried incrementing the activities time for 30s to more, still it's same. 

Please if anyone can suggest way to correct this, it will be really appreciated. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP: Unspecified provider error occurred. See Er...
entry.content: I made in the class for projection BDEF. Check in all methods how you fill the keys and specify them field by field.

entry.title: Re: Disable Valuehelp button for Selection field in fiori...

entry.title: IW21 new tab at item screen
entry.content:
Dear SCN,

Is it possible to create a new tab at item screen level ?

New fields added to QMFE (append structure)

Thanks.

Regards,

Maria João Rocha

entry.title: Re: /3m3 Wage type in Payroll Module
entry.content: Was helpful to sort out production issue. Thank you so much.

entry.title: Re: How to read MPL attachments from odata api as part of...
entry.content:
You get the response body from the exception.  There is no need to read MPL. There is sample for the script to do this in the documentation. 
https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/handle-exceptions

entry.title: How to transport Screen Persona Flavor?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

I created a screen persona in the system. I wanted to transport this screen persona flavor to the test system but the following errors occured:

  1. Screen persona is not saved in software collection/customizing transport
  2. Screen persona could be exported as zip file from app /PERSONAS/ADMIN but it is not possible to be imported in the test system.

How could I bring the created screen persona from customizing to test system?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to transport Screen Persona Flavor?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

The flavor creation and maintenance happen in the development or quality systems, depending on the landscape set-up, using Adaptation Transport Organizer (ATO). In the productive system, information from the administration environment is read-only for diagnostic purposes. For more information on transporting in two-tier landscapes, for example, through exporting and importing software collections, see SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Q to P Transport Process.

The ATO status of the objects from the administration environment and during the flavor creation defines possible actions in your system. In general, activities in the administration environment and the flavor maintenance are object configurations that can only be performed in enabled systems and transported into subsequent systems using the ATO.

For further information I truly recommend checking the documents below:

Manage UI Adaptations with Screen Personas

Getting Started with UI Adaptations for Classic Applications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

For additional information on RF setup please check the below documents:

3048632 - Information and restrictions for mobile data terminals in Warehouse Management in S/4HANA Cloud or EWM in SAP S/4HANA On-Premise

Screen Personas for Mobile RF Devices in Warehouse Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud How-To Guide

 

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I am currently involving on a SAP S/4HANA Public Edition implementation and we have some requirements that requires custom development. These developments must built using SAPUI5. I would like confirming if it is possible to implement these developments on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public. I have looked at documentation for that, but I have not found definitively answer.

Best regard,

Anthony

SAPUI5 SAP Fiori SAP ERP SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Business Application Studio SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: how to connect to SAP ECC Extractors to DATASPHERE ?
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

how to connect to SAP ECC Extractors to DATASPHERE ?  we dont have BW system . BW Bridge is only option ?

Rk
